summary: Monte Carlo + empirical analysis for max VIX intraday high over 9 trading days starting from VIX ~14.5
content:
Current VIX: ~14.5 (Jan 2, 2026). Recent range: 13.4-15.4 in late Dec.
Key catalysts in window: FOMC meeting Jan 27-28, Q4 earnings season, Trump policy risk.
VIX mean-reverting toward ~19 long-term average.
Monte Carlo (100k sims) with mean-reversion + jumps + FOMC boost gives:
- 10th: 15.5, 20th: 16.5, 40th: 18.0, 60th: 19.5, 80th: 22.5, 90th: 26.0
Empirical cross-check: Recent calm windows show max VIX high only 1-2 pts above start.
But FOMC meeting historically causes 2-4 point intraday swings.
